items.claim: Cody Garbrandt is explosive when it comes to counters.
items.quote: He is pretty explosive when it comes to counters.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt has a suspect chin and has been dropped multiple times.
items.quote: I'm obviously concerned with Cody's chin. I know he hasn't been knocked out in quite a few years, but obviously one can't forget that that chin of his. He has been dropped multiple times.

items.claim: Adrian Yanez is very durable and technical with power in his hands.
items.quote: And Adrian Yanez is very durable, very technical, and has power in those hands.

items.claim: Gable Steveson is a high-level American wrestler.
items.quote: Gable Steveson he's a American wrestler, a pretty good one

items.claim: Robert Whittaker possesses elite fight IQ and outstanding takedown defense.
items.quote: Elite fight IQ, outstanding takedown defense

items.claim: Nikita Krylov has a significant size advantage over Robert Whittaker.
items.quote: dude's huge. Size advantage, he has it.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker has been finished in previous fights.
items.quote: we have seen Robert Whittaker finished before

items.claim: Terrance McKinney has a 100% finish rate.
King Green has elite boxing fundamentals and excellent defensive movement.
items.quote: King Green, elite boxing fundamentals, excellent defensive movement

items.claim: Loik Radzhabov has excellent footwork and sharp countering ability.
Benoit Saint Denis has elite cardio and relentless forward pressure.
items.quote: BSD elite cardio relentless forward pressure

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett is a Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu black belt with an excellent submission game.
items.quote: excellent submission game, you know he's a black belt jujitsu.
